name: supabase
description: CLI for local development, database migrations, Edge Functions, and deployment of Supabase projects.

install.scoop: scoop bucket add supabase https://github.com/supabase/scoop-bucket.git && scoop install supabase

commands.name: start
commands.description: Start the local Supabase development stack

commands.name: db diff
commands.description: Generate a migration by diffing local schema changes

commands.name: db push
commands.description: Deploy local migrations to the remote database

commands.name: gen types
commands.description: Generate TypeScript types from the database schema

commands.name: functions deploy
commands.description: Deploy an Edge Function to your Supabase project

use_cases: Scaffold and manage database migrations for Supabase projects
Generate typed client code from database schema for type-safe queries
Deploy serverless Edge Functions as part of CI/CD pipelines
Inspect database performance with bloat, locks, and outlier queries
Manage project secrets and configuration across environments
agent_metadata.example_workflow: supabase db diff -f add_users_table && supabase db push && supabase gen types typescript --project-id <ref> > src/types/supabase.ts
